title: thymus serpyllum f. porcii
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. porcii, also known as creeping thyme, is a variety of the thyme plant that has fragrant leaves and small flowers. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include being antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. porcii include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
